title: Fashion Inspiration: Comfy Cozy Fall
excerpt: You already know Fall is my favorite. Everything about it. I shared some Fashion Inspiration based on Autumn Hues last year and I thought I’d do the same this year. Today’s Fall picks are all about being comfy and cozy and warm!
content:
You already know Fall is my favorite. Everything about it. I shared some Fashion Inspiration based on Autumn Hues last year and I thought I’d do the same this year. Today’s Fall picks are all about being comfy and cozy and warm!

I can’t decide which item I like the best! I’ve been a little obsessed with marigold and gray lately, so I had to use those colors somewhere in the outfit. I also love being cozy in the Fall so there are no horrible-uncomfortable-yet-stylish pieces in this lot- all things that you could wear with ease. Really, I want every piece of this look! I actually already bought the red and black flannel shirt and love it. Check out where to get each of the items below. Happy shopping!

Red and Black Sonoma Plaid Flannel Shirt: Kohls

Dark Gray Flared Corduroy Pants: H&M

Black Leather Jacket: J. Crew

Black “Marty” Boots: Shoe Dazzle

Giani Bernini Pebble Leather Tip Crossbody Bag in Oxblood: Macy’s

“Jewel of a Tuque” Hat: ModCloth

“Yellow Brick Cold” Scarf: ModCloth

Red Daisy Earrings: Katie Crafts

Essie Nail Lacquer in Bordeaux: Amazon

Which is your favorite piece from the above Fashion Inspiration: Comfy Cozy Fall? What is your fave Fall color?
